decision.label: No-Go: Preview Only
decision.reason: Detroit Dynamo is ready for stakeholder review, but live backend, payment, waiver, league/facility, proof, SEO, redirect, and owner approval gates are still open.

sections.label: Current LC site preservation
sections.decisionQuestion: Can the team prove the existing LC Training site, booking, auth, blog, forms, navigation, and rollback target are preserved before any brand promotion?
evidenceRequired: Passing current-site route smoke output
Passing browser QA with LC root and booking screenshots
Rollback deployment id or previous production build target
Owner-approved launch window before root-route promotion

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Current LC route smoke output, browser QA report, and rollback deployment id
Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

sections.label: Backend data activation
sections.decisionQuestion: Are isolated Appwrite dd_* collections, deployed functions, permissions, production-preview submissions, and authenticated admin actions verified?
evidenceRequired: Backend preflight passes without exposing secrets
Provision/apply transcript proves isolated dd_* collections exist
Functions are deployed with expected scopes and variables
Production-preview lead and admin action submissions pass

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Backend preflight report plus Appwrite provision/apply transcript for isolated dd_* collections
Production-preview submission ids for every public form variant and authenticated admin action

sections.label: Payments and packages
sections.decisionQuestion: Has the owner approved package prices, provider product ids, taxes/fees, refund rules, and sandbox payment behavior?
evidenceRequired: Approved package matrix for training, camps, dues, tryouts, and sponsors
Provider product ids or invoice workflow ids mapped to records
Successful sandbox success, failure, cancel, refund, and webhook tests
Refund, cancellation, and settlement handling documented

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Approved package matrix with prices, session counts, taxes/fees, refund rules, and provider product ids
Successful sandbox payment, failure, refund/cancel, and webhook/audit test evidence
Approved waiver/legal version register for youth, adult, medical, media, camp, and travel consent
Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

sections.label: Waivers and legal
sections.decisionQuestion: Are waiver versions, guardian/adult signatures, medical consent, media release, retention, expiration, and revocation rules legally approved and tested?
evidenceRequired: Approved waiver/legal version register
Guardian and adult signature workflow test evidence
Medical, emergency, media, and travel consent rules approved
Waiver status mapped to registration, roster, camp, and tryout workflows

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Approved package matrix with prices, session counts, taxes/fees, refund rules, and provider product ids
Approved waiver/legal version register for youth, adult, medical, media, camp, and travel consent
Guardian/adult signature workflow test with audit trail, export, expiration, and revocation handling
Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

sections.label: League, competition, and facility facts
sections.decisionQuestion: Can every league, fixture, result, facility, schedule, venue, staff, and roster claim be backed by official confirmation or owner-approved wording?
evidenceRequired: Official league and competition documents before current-membership claims
Confirmed facility access, permits, schedules, insurance, and emergency procedures
Fixture, opponent, venue, roster, staff, and competition proof before publication
Owner-approved public wording for every unconfirmed pathway reference

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
Facility permits/agreements, schedule windows, emergency procedures, insurance notes, and location publish approval
Staff approval, background/safeguarding status, roster publication approvals, and media-release coverage
Sponsor logo permissions, testimonial approvals, media releases, news proof, and publishing calendar

sections.label: Staff, rosters, and safeguarding
sections.decisionQuestion: Are staff profiles, coach credentials, youth roster visibility, media releases, background/safeguarding status, and role grants approved?
evidenceRequired: Approved staff names, roles, bios, licenses, and public contact rules
Background/safeguarding status for youth-facing staff
Roster visibility follows guardian consent and media-release controls
Team manager and coach access scoped by trusted role grants

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Approved package matrix with prices, session counts, taxes/fees, refund rules, and provider product ids
Approved waiver/legal version register for youth, adult, medical, media, camp, and travel consent
Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording

Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

sections.label: Sponsor, media, and proof content

Media releases and testimonial permissions
News proof tied to approved source material
Sponsor package promises match approved inventory

sections.label: SEO, redirects, and promotion cutover
sections.decisionQuestion: Are metadata, Open Graph assets, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, noindex removal, redirect exclusions, QA, and rollback instructions approved?
evidenceRequired: Approved metadata, social image, favicon, sitemap, robots, and canonical URLs
Owner-approved noindex removal tied to launch window
Redirect plan includes auth, admin, booking, and payment callback exclusions
Post-cutover desktop/mobile route QA and rollback instructions are documented

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Approved package matrix with prices, session counts, taxes/fees, refund rules, and provider product ids
Approved waiver/legal version register for youth, adult, medical, media, camp, and travel consent
Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

sections.label: Post-launch monitoring and rollback watch
sections.decisionQuestion: Is there a first-hour and first-week monitoring plan for route health, forms, booking, admin, payments, waivers, analytics, support, and rollback?
evidenceRequired: Post-launch browser QA command and owner signoff path
Rollback trigger list for core routes, forms, payments, auth, admin, and support failures
Support inbox and legal/support communications monitoring plan
Analytics/search-console observation window and closeout note

relatedEvidenceItems.requiredArtifact: Current LC route smoke output, browser QA report, and rollback deployment id
Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions

requiredOwnerActions: Review this packet with the owner before any root-route, SEO, redirect, payment, waiver, or claim publication change.
Attach real evidence for every unresolved launch evidence item.
Fill the owner evidence intake worksheet so each proof item has a location, approver, decision, date, and notes.
Record external confirmation actions for payments, waivers, league/facility facts, staff/rosters, sponsors/media, and SEO/redirects.
Keep Detroit Dynamo under /detroit-dynamo until every external gate has real evidence and owner approval.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Approved private, small-group, team-training, camp, tryout, dues, and sponsor package pricing
Selected payment provider, checkout flow, refund policy, and failed-payment handling
Tax/fee treatment, discount policy, and settlement ownership
Admin reporting needs for packages, payments, refunds, and outstanding balances
latestByArea.publish_rule: Do not publish checkout links or exact package commitments until pricing and provider setup are approved.
latestByArea.next_action: Owner approves package matrix, provider, refund rules, and admin payment fields.
latestByArea.note: Owner must approve exact prices and provider product ids before checkout exists.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Youth participation waiver and medical consent language
Media release, privacy/terms language, and adult participation waiver
Travel, emergency contact, and camp/clinic consent requirements
Versioning, expiration, guardian signature, and retention rules
latestByArea.publish_rule: Do not collect signatures or present legal text as final until owner/legal review is complete.
latestByArea.next_action: Prepare approved waiver versions and map each form/program to the right waiver requirement.
latestByArea.note: Preview artifact only; no signatures are enabled.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Confirmed senior men league acceptance before naming current UPSL or similar membership
Confirmed senior women league acceptance before naming current UPSL Women or similar membership
Confirmed youth league placement before naming current youth competition
Fixture, opponent, venue, roster, staff, and competition rules confirmed before publication
latestByArea.publish_rule: Use future-pathway language until written league or competition confirmation exists.
latestByArea.next_action: Collect official league/competition documentation and owner-approved public wording.
latestByArea.note: Keep public copy future-pathway until official league documents exist.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Confirmed training locations, field permits, indoor facility access, and match venues
Calendar availability for private training, camps, tryouts, youth teams, and senior teams
Insurance, safety, weather, cancellation, check-in, and emergency procedures
Published location names, addresses, parking/access notes, and facility partner permissions
latestByArea.publish_rule: Do not publish facility commitments, addresses, or schedules until operating access is confirmed.
latestByArea.next_action: Confirm facility partners, operating rules, insurance requirements, and calendar windows.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Confirmed staff names, roles, bios, licenses, photos, and public contact rules
Background check, safeguarding, and youth communication standards

latestByArea.next_action: Collect staff/roster approvals and map internal roles to admin permissions.
latestByArea.note: Staff/roster proof stays gated until permissions and safeguarding evidence exist.

latestByArea.destination: Fixture preview external confirmation ledger; this does not approve publication or clear promotion gates
required_facts: Approved sponsor packages, logos, website links, activation inventory, and display permissions

Launch announcements, news categories, editorial approval workflow, and image rights
SEO/social assets, redirect timing, sitemap/robots publication, and current-site migration wording
